name: rockstarr-social
description: Rockstarr AI social plugin. Drafts short-form social posts (LinkedIn default; X and Instagram optional) in the client's approved voice, builds balanced weekly batches, and exports to the client's scheduler (Publer or GrowthAmp planner). Also owns LinkedIn polls, monthly page-follow invites, and a daily comment-check workflow with per-comment approval. Every batch flows through rockstarr-infra:approve — the bot never posts directly.
